siteDocumentTitle: GrowthKit — Free AI growth report for entrepreneurs
waitingRoomNote: We're getting a lot of requests right now. You don't need to do anything — your report will continue automatically in a moment.

heroCopy: Turn a rough business brief into a polished consultant-style growth report with positioning, offers, scorecards, outreach templates, and a practical action plan. Your first report is free.
exampleShowcaseTitle: This is what your report looks like
exampleShowcaseLead: A real sample — positioning, scorecard, 30-day plan and sales templates. Yours is generated to fit your business.

termsIntro: These Terms & Conditions ("Terms") govern your access to and use of GrowthKit Studio (the "Service"), operated by jcode.be. By using the Service, you agree to these Terms. If you do not agree, do not use the Service.

termsSections.title: 1. About the Service
paragraphs: GrowthKit (also referred to as Entrepreneur Growth Kit) is an online tool that turns a short business brief into a detailed growth report, including positioning analysis, offer suggestions, scorecards, templates, and action plans.
The Service is available at https://growthkit.jcode.be and uses third-party AI and cloud services to generate and store your reports.

termsSections.title: 2. Operator
paragraphs: The Service is operated by jcode.be ("we", "us", or "our"). For questions about these Terms, contact us via https://jcode.be.

termsSections.title: 3. Eligibility and Accounts
paragraphs: You must be at least 16 years old and able to enter a binding agreement to use the Service.

Some features, such as saving reports to your account, require sign-in via Google or email. You are responsible for maintaining the security of your account credentials and for all activity under your account.
You must provide accurate information and notify us promptly if you suspect unauthorised access to your account.

termsSections.title: 4. Your Content
paragraphs: You may submit business information, briefs, and other inputs ("User Content") to generate reports. You retain ownership of your User Content.

You grant us a limited licence to process, store, transmit, and display your User Content solely to operate and improve the Service, including generating reports and saving them to your account when you choose to do so.
You represent that you have the right to submit your User Content and that it does not infringe third-party rights or violate applicable law.

termsSections.title: 5. AI-Generated Output
paragraphs: Reports are generated using automated systems, including third-party AI models. Output may be incomplete, inaccurate, outdated, or unsuitable for your specific situation.

The Service and its output are provided for general informational and planning purposes only. They do not constitute legal, financial, tax, accounting, or professional business advice. You are solely responsible for reviewing, validating, and acting on any generated content.
We do not guarantee specific business results from using the Service or any report it produces.

termsSections.title: 6. Acceptable Use
paragraphs: You agree not to misuse the Service. Prohibited conduct includes, without limitation: attempting to gain unauthorised access to systems or accounts; interfering with the Service or its infrastructure; scraping or bulk-extracting data beyond normal use; submitting unlawful, harmful, or abusive content; impersonating others; or using the Service to develop competing datasets or models in violation of applicable third-party terms.
We may suspend or terminate access if we reasonably believe you have violated these Terms or applicable law.

termsSections.title: 7. Intellectual Property
paragraphs: We own the Service, including its software, design, branding, and underlying technology, except for User Content and third-party materials.
Subject to these Terms, we grant you a personal, non-exclusive, non-transferable licence to use the Service and to export reports for your own business purposes.
You may not copy, modify, reverse engineer, resell, or commercially exploit the Service itself except as expressly permitted.

termsSections.title: 8. Third-Party Services
paragraphs: The Service relies on third-party providers, which may include AI generation services, Firebase authentication and database services, and hosting providers. Your use of those features may also be subject to the respective providers' terms and privacy policies.
We are not responsible for third-party services outside our reasonable control, including outages, rate limits, or policy changes.

termsSections.title: 9. Availability and Changes
paragraphs: We aim to keep the Service available but do not guarantee uninterrupted or error-free operation. Features may change, be limited, or be withdrawn at any time.
At busy times, report generation may be queued or temporarily delayed. We are not liable for delays caused by high demand or by maintenance.

termsSections.title: 10. Fees
paragraphs: GrowthKit is a paid service. Generating a report requires a report credit, bought through a one-time payment — there is no subscription. The current price is always shown before you pay, and new users may receive one free credit to try the service first.

Payments are processed securely by our payment provider, Stripe; we never see or store your full card details. Prices are shown in euros, and any applicable taxes are indicated at checkout. Purchased credits remain available in your account and do not expire.

Because each report is generated and delivered to you immediately, purchases are generally non-refundable once the report has been generated, except where a refund is required by applicable consumer law. If a payment fails or a report does not generate correctly, contact us via https://jcode.be and we will put it right.

termsSections.title: 11. Disclaimer of Warranties
paragraphs: The Service is provided "as is" and "as available" to the fullest extent permitted by law. We disclaim all warranties, whether express, implied, or statutory, including warranties of merchantability, fitness for a particular purpose, accuracy, and non-infringement.

termsSections.title: 12. Limitation of Liability
paragraphs: To the fullest extent permitted by law, jcode.be and its operators will not be liable for any indirect, incidental, special, consequential, or punitive damages, or for loss of profits, revenue, data, goodwill, or business opportunities arising from your use of the Service.
Our total liability for any claim relating to the Service is limited to the greater of (a) the amount you paid us for the Service in the twelve months before the claim, or (b) EUR 50.
Nothing in these Terms excludes liability that cannot be excluded under applicable law.

termsSections.title: 13. Indemnification
paragraphs: You agree to indemnify and hold harmless jcode.be from claims, damages, losses, and expenses (including reasonable legal fees) arising from your User Content, your use of the Service, or your violation of these Terms or applicable law.

termsSections.title: 14. Termination
paragraphs: You may stop using the Service at any time. We may suspend or terminate your access if you breach these Terms or if continued provision becomes impractical for legal, security, or operational reasons.
Provisions that by their nature should survive termination will remain in effect, including sections on intellectual property, disclaimers, limitation of liability, and governing law.

termsSections.title: 15. Privacy
paragraphs: Your use of the Service involves processing of personal and business data, including account information and saved reports. We handle data in accordance with applicable privacy law, including the GDPR where it applies.

Data may be stored locally in your browser and, when you sign in and save reports, in cloud infrastructure linked to your account. Do not submit sensitive personal data unless necessary for your intended use.

termsSections.title: 16. Changes to These Terms
paragraphs: We may update these Terms from time to time. The "Last updated" date at the top indicates the latest revision. Material changes will be reflected on this page. Continued use of the Service after changes take effect constitutes acceptance of the updated Terms.

termsSections.title: 17. Governing Law and Disputes
paragraphs: These Terms are governed by the laws of Belgium, without regard to conflict-of-law rules. Unless mandatory consumer protection law requires otherwise, the courts of Belgium shall have exclusive jurisdiction over disputes arising from these Terms or the Service.
If you are a consumer in the European Union, you may also have rights under mandatory local consumer protection rules.

termsSections.title: 18. Contact
paragraphs: Questions about these Terms or the Service can be sent via https://jcode.be.
